channel.title: Home on John Westbroek
channel.description: Recent content in Home on John Westbroek

item.title: Super Nintendo
item.description: Console Super NES (PAL) Control Deck SNSP-001A (FRG) HOL My original console from 1992 Controller 8BitDo SN30 2.4g wireless gamepad - SF edition Accessories CoolNovelties.co.uk —Sync over Luma RGB Scart Cable A brand-new RGB scart lead. Custom made with 2 metres of screened flexible video cable - featuring SYNC over Luma for improved image quality. Link Games Label Title Genre Year Dev - Pub SNSP Set Aladdin, Disney's Action/ Platform 1993 Capcom RJ-EUR C Alien 3 Action/ Shooter 1993 Probe Software -

item.title: My name’s John. I live and work just outside Bristol, UK.
item.description: RESUME Elsewhere @johnwestbroek LinkedIn Bluesky GitHub Instapaper Discogs Last.fm Pinterest MEDIA Working on a slef owned Linux storage solution Using Ubuntu server on refurbished hardware

item.title: Ants in the Kitchen of the Earth

item.title: Dokkōdō
item.description: Miyamoto Musashi is a legendary swordsman, undefeated in 63 one-one-one duels. He killed his first man when he was 13. He fought in numerous wars, then transitioned into being a wandering swordsman, pursuing mastery over his chosen path. Later in his life he put down the sword, and pursued mastery in calligraphy, painting, philosophy, metallurgy, and more. Miyamoto Musashi is the legend of many paths. Musashi was a Ronin. His master, Hirata Takehiko died in 1609.

item.title: Website
item.description: ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ TAG CHEAT SHEET ║ ╠═══════════════════╦═══════════════════════╣ ║ MAIN TAGS ║ DETAIL TAGS ║ ╠═══════════════════╬═══════════════════════╣ ║ developing ║ essay ║ ║ writing ║ documentation ║ ║ computing ║ notes ║ ║ gaming ║ list ║ ║ illustration ║ research ║ ║ philosophy ║ experiment ║ ║ profile ║ code ║ ║ ║ wip ║ ║ ║ hardware ║ ║ ║ software ║ ║ ║ tools ║ ║ ║ media ║ ║ ║ retro ║ ╚═══════════════════╩═══════════════════════╝ Folder (3-letter) Long name / purpose Example tags inside Notes LIB Library writing, essay, documentation, notes, manual All text-based content, essays, manuals, and general reading material.
